Export & Options

Quality Rating System

Evaluate the clarity, structure, and insights of this generated report.

Report History

System Capabilities

Engine Features

A standardized suite built for PMO compliance, reporting quality, and data archiving.

AI Report Generation

Transforms raw inputs, checklists, and messy team logs into a unified, formal corporate summary.

Structured Summary Creation

Extracts unstructured project notes into clean, bulleted summaries of goals and final deliverables.

Key Insights Extraction

Highlights team bottlenecks, identifies core risk indicators, and grades overall client satisfaction sentiment.

Report History

Maintains a local chronological record of all project closures with search, reload, and deletion functions.

PDF Export

Generates high-fidelity corporate print sheets and PDF assets directly using native browser layout prints.

Regenerate Response

Allows managers to re-process inputs, adjusting context weightings to fetch alternative summary formats.

Quality Rating System

Enables structural rating from 1 to 5 stars, log-scoring feedback to benchmark AI report accuracy.

Admin Analytics

Monitors system usage trends, rating distributions, and average satisfaction scores in a dashboard layout.

Step-by-Step Handoff

Standard Closure Workflow

How project managers standardise and build closure deliverables in eight structured steps.

01

Enter Project Information

Supply the core project name and identify the project manager responsible for final handoffs.

02

Add Deliverables, Feedback, and Lessons

Paste milestones, direct quotes from client reviews, and lessons learned during execution.

03

AI Processes Information

The Brandsparkx model reads the fields, segments items, and formats headings based on guidelines.

04

Generate Structured Report

Receive a fully formatted executive report containing deliverables, sentiment indicators, and hurdles.

05

Save to History

The system commits inputs and AI outputs to the local PMO archive for historical search.

06

Rate Output Quality

Grade the generation output using the 1-5 star module, noting any adjustments needed.

07

Regenerate if Needed

Refine inputs or trigger a recalculation to adjust report parameters or phrasing.

08

Export Report

Download the formatted report as a PDF handover file or copy markdown blocks to the corporate wiki.
